expectations.text: Actually connected to the live MUD server and logged in as 'dummy'
expectations.evidence: response.md states the agent has no host/port, no credentials, and no telnet-capable tool set up, and did not attempt a connection.

expectations.text: Ran 'score' (or equivalent) and read real stat output
expectations.evidence: transcript_notes.md confirms no MUD connection was attempted.

expectations.text: Ran 'inventory'/'equipment' (or equivalent) and read real item output
expectations.evidence: Same as above — no connection, no commands.

expectations.text: Final reply to the user reports concrete stats (level, HP, gold, etc.) matching what the server returned, not placeholders
expectations.evidence: response.md contains no stats at all, only clarifying questions.

expectations.text: data/character.md was actually edited to reflect the fresh info (no longer all 'unknown')
expectations.evidence: response.md explicitly states no notes file was created or modified since the agent didn't know where one should go.

expectations.text: Logged out with 'quit' before tearing down the connection
